title: vanillacraft
description:
Vanillacraft is a lightly enhanced vanilla modpack that includes:

Mobs from past mob votes

Improved village and dungeon generation

Parkour mechanics and a player leveling system
body:
![vanllacraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8829731d571ba6fb68bc28957df59b415505ce4a.png)
**Vanillacraft is a lightly enhanced vanilla modpack that includes**

 Mobs from past mob votes

Improved village and dungeon generation

Parkour mechanics and a player leveling system

It keeps the vanilla feel while adding more depth and variety to your survival experience!
